languages.text: Голос Ювенны как наследницы имеет особый вес. Необходимо найти способ вывести ее из игры.

traits.locale_text: Голос Ювенны как наследницы имеет особый вес. Необходимо найти способ вывести ее из игры.

languages.text: As heiress, Juvenna's voice carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.
languages.original_text: Голос Ювенны как наследницы имеет особый вес. Необходимо найти способ вывести ее из игры.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna's voice as heiress carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.

languages.text: Als Erbin hat Jevennas Stimme besonderes Gewicht. Sie muss irgendwie aus der Gleichung entfernt werden.
languages.original_text: As heiress, Juvenna's voice carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.

traits.locale_text: Als Erbin hat Jevennas Stimme besonderes Gewicht. Sie muss irgendwie aus der Gleichung entfernt werden.

languages.text: Juvenna étant l'héritière, son avis pèse lourd dans la balance. Il faut trouver un moyen de la neutraliser.
languages.original_text: As heiress, Juvenna's voice carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna étant l'héritière, son avis pèse lourd dans la balance. Il faut trouver un moyen de la neutraliser.

languages.text: 作为继承人，尤文娜的话相当有分量。必须想办法让她出局。
languages.original_text: As heiress, Juvenna's voice carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.

traits.locale_text: 作为继承人，尤文娜的话相当有分量。必须想办法让她出局。

languages.text: Como heredera, el voto de Juvenna es particularmente influyente. Debe hallarse un modo de eliminarla de la ecuación.
languages.original_text: As heiress, Juvenna's voice carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.

traits.locale_text: Como heredera, el voto de Juvenna es particularmente influyente. Debe hallarse un modo de eliminarla de la ecuación.

languages.text: 相続人としてのジュウェンナの声には特別な重みがある。彼女をゲームから外す方法を見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: Juwenna's voice as heiress carries special weight. A way must be found to take her out of the game.

languages.text: Vâris olarak Juvenna'nın sesi özel bir ağırlık taşıyor. Onu denklemden çıkarmanın bir yolu bulunmalı.
languages.original_text: As heiress, Juvenna's voice carries particular weight. A way must be found to remove her from the equation.
